title: Webhook URL HTTPS Validation
description: The WebhookSubscriptionCreate schema (api/v1/webhooks.py:31) defines url as a plain str without scheme validation. Webhook payloads contain event data and are signed with HMAC secrets — delivering over HTTP exposes both payload and signature. Use Pydantic HttpUrl and add a validator to require https:// scheme in production, or at minimum block http://.
validation: Webhook URL field uses Pydantic HttpUrl type
HTTPS scheme is required in production
HTTP scheme is optionally allowed in development/testing
Clear error message when non-HTTPS URL is provided
